title: Kronite Mod: Revamped!
description:
A Exploration mod
that adds a new Dimension,  Ore and Enemies to fight.
body:
# About the Mod (W.I.P):
## Kronite Dimension:
Get ready to dive into a whole new adventure with the Kronite Mod! This mod introduces the Kronite Dimension, a brand new world full of strange entities.

## New Mobs:
Face off against terrifying new mobs like the Kronite Warrior or the Ghost Creepers. If you think you’re tough enough, prepare yourself for the ultimate challenge: the Kronite War Lord, a new boss to face off against!

## The Kronite Ore:
To aid in your journey, the Kronite Ore can be mined to craft new Kronite gear. Defeat the Kronite War Lords to craft yourself the Allmighty _Kronite Warlord Sword_.

![Mcreator Tile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a388a6bc0580df347a178ab47a71452c5a612098_0.webp)
![Modrinth Tile](https://i.imgur.com/9xU1uLq.png)


# Mod Origin
This mod is a revamped port to Minecraft 1.20.1 of a small but exciting mod originally **released in 2015 by a user named FilmTech**. Created using **MCreator**.

**Link to the Original 2015 mod can be found here** --> [Kronite Mod - 1.7.10](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kronite-mod)

It has been a while since it's last update so i thought it would be a great Idea to bring it back.

Any feedback, comments, or ideas are always welcome and appreciated!
-**theCodemander**
